---
title: Mathematics 
subtitle: Guide Map of Blogs in Mathematics Section
description: |
  Rather than studying pure mathematics, I focus on studying and organizing mathematical concepts by filling out this mathematics blog section with some mathematics stuff for deep learning
categories:
  - Mathematics
author: Kwangmin Kim
date: 03/01/2100
---

# Contents

## Basic

* 2023-03-23, [Variable types](./variables.qmd)
* 2023-03-14, [Harmonic Mean](./mean.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Function
  * 2023-01-31, [Function](./function/function.qmd)
  * 2023-01-31, [Function (1) - Univariable Scalar Function (One to One)](./function/univariable_scalar_function.qmd)
  * 2023-01-31, [Function (2) - Multi-variable Scalar Function (Many to One)](./function/multivariable_scalar_function.qmd)
  * 2023-01-31, [Function (3) - Univariable Vector Function (One to Many)](./function/univariable_vector_function.qmd)
  * 2023-01-31, [Function (4) - Multi-variable Vector Function (Many to Many)](./function/mutivariable_vector_function.qmd)
  * 2023-02-18, [Function (5) - Composite Function](./function/composite_function.qmd)
  * 2026-03-23, [Function (6) - 함수의 합 vs 합성함수 — Sequential vs Joint 추정](./function/function_addition_vs_composition.qmd)
* 2023-02-18, [Transformations of Functions](./transformation.qmd)
* 2023-03-24, [Convex Combination](./convex_combination.qmd)
* 2023-03-18, [Higher Order Derivative](./2023-03-18_higher_order_derivative.qmd)
* 2023-03-15, [Minimizer & Minimum](./minimizer.qmd)
* 2023-03-15, [Taylor Series](./taylor_series.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Vector & Matrix
* 2023-03-14, [Limit, $\epsilon-\delta$ Method](./epsilon_delta.qmd)
* Differentiation
  * 2023-02-04, [Derivative (1) - Univariable Scalar Funtion](./2023-02-04_uni_derivative.qmd)
  * 2023-02-10, [Derivative (2) - Chain Rule & Partial Derivative](./2023-02-10_composite_partial_derivative.qmd)
  * 1111-11-11, Derivative (3) - Higher Order Derivative
  * 1111-11-11, Derivative (4) - Mean Value Theorem
  * 1111-11-11, Derivative (5) - Gradient
* 2023-03-15, [Talyer's Series](./taylor_series/index.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Gradient Direction
* 1111-11-11, Random Variable
* 1111-11-11, Probability Distribution
* 1111-11-11, Information Theory - Entropy
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11,

## Linear Algebra

### 선수과목 (Prerequisites)

* 2023-03-30, [Basic Vector(1) - Vector Operations](./linear_algebra/01.basic_vector.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [Basic Vector(2) - Vector Norm and Dot Product](./linear_algebra/02.norm_dot-product.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [Basic Vector(3) - Vector Equation](./linear_algebra/03.vector_equation.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [Basic Matrix(1) - Matrix Operations](./linear_algebra/04.matrix_operations.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [Basic Matrix(2) - Matrix Multiplication](./linear_algebra/05.matrix_multiplication.qmd)

### MIT 18.06 Linear Algebra (Gilbert Strang) 강의 시리즈

* 2026-04-08, [MIT 18.06 코스 전체 개요 — 왜 배우는가, 무엇을 다루는가](./linear_algebra/mit-00-gilbert-strang-overview.qmd)

#### Ch.1 Introduction to Vectors

* 2026-04-06, [Ch.1 Overview — 선형결합, 내적, 코사인, 노름 종류](./linear_algebra/mit-01-1-gilbert-strang-vectors-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-06, [Ch.1 §1.1 — Vectors and Linear Combinations](./linear_algebra/mit-01-2-gilbert-strang-vectors-linear-combinations.qmd)
* 2026-04-08, [Ch.1 §1.2 — Lengths and Dot Products](./linear_algebra/mit-01-3-gilbert-strang-vectors-length-dot-products.qmd)
* 2026-03-09, [선형 방정식의 기하학적 해석](./linear_algebra/mit-01-gilbert-strang-overview.qmd)

#### Ch.2 Solving Linear Equations

* 2026-04-08, [Ch.2 Overview — Row Picture · Column Picture · Ax=b에서 LU 분해까지](./linear_algebra/mit-02-1-gilbert-strang-solving-linear-equation-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-08, [Ch.2 §2.1 — Vectors and Linear Equations](./linear_algebra/mit-02-2-gilbert-strang-vectors-linear-equations.qmd)
* 2026-04-08, [Ch.2 §2.2 — The Idea of Elimination](./linear_algebra/mit-02-3-gilbert-strang-elimination-idea.qmd)
* 2026-04-08, [Ch.2 §2.3 — Elimination Using Matrices](./linear_algebra/mit-02-4-gilbert-strang-matrix-elimination.qmd)
* 2026-04-08, [Ch.2 §2.4 — Rules for Matrix Operations](./linear_algebra/mit-02-5-gilbert-strang-matrix-operation-rules.qmd)
* 2026-04-08, [Ch.2 §2.6 — Elimination = Factorization: A = LU](./linear_algebra/mit-02-6-gilbert-strang-factorization.qmd)
* 2026-04-08, [Ch.2 §2.7 — Transposes and Permutations](./linear_algebra/mit-02-7-gilbert-strang-transpose-permutations.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [연립방정식 기초](./linear_algebra/06.system_of_lineqr_equations.qmd)
* 2026-03-10, [소거법과 후방 대입](./linear_algebra/mit-02-gilbert-strang-elimination.qmd)
* 2026-03-11, [행렬 곱셈과 역행렬](./linear_algebra/mit-03-gilbert-strang-multiplication.qmd)
* 2026-03-12, [A = LU 분해](./linear_algebra/mit-04-gilbert-strang-factorization.qmd)
* 2026-03-13, [치환, 전치, 벡터 공간](./linear_algebra/mit-05-gilbert-strang-substitution.qmd)

#### Ch.3 Vector Spaces and Subspaces

* 2026-04-09, [Ch.3 §3.1 — Spaces of Vectors and Subspaces Overview](./linear_algebra/mit-03-1-gilbert-strang-vector-space-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-09, [Ch.3 §3.1 심화 — Spaces of Vectors (행렬·다항식·함수 공간, 부분공간 교집합·합)](./linear_algebra/mit-03-2-gilbert-strang-spaces-of-vectors.qmd)
* 2026-04-09, [Ch.3 §3.2 — The Nullspace of A: Solving Ax = 0](./linear_algebra/mit-03-3-gilbert-strang-null-space.qmd)
* 2026-04-09, [Ch.3 §3.3 — The Rank and the Row Reduced Form](./linear_algebra/mit-03-4-gilbert-strang-rank-row-reduced-form.qmd)
* 2026-04-09, [Ch.3 §3.4 — The Complete Solution to Ax = b](./linear_algebra/mit-03-5-gilbert-strang-complete-solution.qmd)
* 2026-04-09, [Ch.3 §3.5 — Independence, Basis and Dimension](./linear_algebra/mit-03-6-gilbert-strang-independence-basis-dimension.qmd)
* 2026-04-09, [Ch.3 §3.6 — Dimensions of the Four Subspaces](./linear_algebra/mit-03-7-gilbert-strang-four-subspaces.qmd)
* 2023-04-10, [Vector Space (참조)](./linear_algebra/09.vector_space.qmd)
* 2023-03-30, [Special Matrices — 멱등/1행렬/중심행렬/공분산 (참조)](./linear_algebra/09.special_matrix.qmd)
* 2026-03-14, [열 공간과 영 공간](./linear_algebra/mit-06-gilbert-strang-column-space.qmd)
* 2026-03-15, [Ax = 0: 피벗 변수와 특수해](./linear_algebra/mit-07-gilbert-strang-null-space.qmd)
* 2026-03-16, [Ax = b의 완전해](./linear_algebra/mit-08-gilbert-strang-row-reduced-form.qmd)
* 2026-03-17, [선형 독립, 기저, 차원](./linear_algebra/mit-09-gilbert-strang-linear-independence.qmd)
* 2026-03-18, [네 개의 근본 부분공간](./linear_algebra/mit-10-gilbert-strang-subspaces.qmd)
* 2023-03-31, [Linear Transformation (참조)](./linear_algebra/10.linear_transformation.qmd)
* 2026-03-19, [행렬 공간, 랭크 1 행렬](./linear_algebra/mit-11-gilbert-strang-matrix-space.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [그래프, 네트워크, 근접 행렬](./linear_algebra/mit-12-gilbert-strang-graph.qmd)

#### Ch.4 Orthogonality

* 2026-03-20, [중간 복습](./linear_algebra/mit-13-gilbert-strang-mid-review.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [직교 벡터와 부분공간](./linear_algebra/mit-14-gilbert-strang-orthogonal.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [투영과 최소자승법](./linear_algebra/mit-15-gilbert-strang-projection.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [투영 행렬과 최소자승법 심화](./linear_algebra/mit-16-gilbert-strang-projection-matrix.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [정규직교 기저와 그람-슈미트](./linear_algebra/mit-17-gilbert-strang-gram-schmidt.qmd)

#### Ch.5 Determinants

* 2026-03-20, [행렬식의 성질](./linear_algebra/mit-18-gilbert-strang-determinant.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [행렬식 공식과 여인수](./linear_algebra/mit-19-gilbert-strang-determinant2.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [크라메르 공식, 역행렬, 부피](./linear_algebra/mit-20-gilbert-strang-determinant3.qmd)

#### Ch.6 Eigenvalues and Eigenvectors

* 2026-03-20, [고윳값과 고유벡터](./linear_algebra/mit-21-gilbert-strang-eigenvalue.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [대각화와 행렬의 거듭제곱](./linear_algebra/mit-22-gilbert-strang-diagonalization.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [미분 방정식과 행렬 지수 함수](./linear_algebra/mit-23-gilbert-strang-differentiation.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [마르코프 행렬과 푸리에 급수](./linear_algebra/mit-24-gilbert-strang-markov-matrix.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [두 번째 중간 복습](./linear_algebra/mit-25-gilbert-strang-mid-reviewe2.qmd)

#### Ch.7 Symmetric Matrices and Positive Definiteness

* 2026-03-20, [대칭 행렬과 양정치 판별](./linear_algebra/mit-26-gilbert-strang-symmetric-matrices.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [복소 행렬과 고속 푸리에 변환](./linear_algebra/mit-27-gilbert-strang-complex-matrices.qmd)
* 2023-04-02, [Linear Form (참조)](./linear_algebra/11.linear_form.qmd)
* 2023-04-02, [Bilinear Form (참조)](./linear_algebra/11.bilinear_form.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [양정치 행렬과 이차형식](./linear_algebra/mit-28-gilbert-strang-positive-definite-matrices.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [닮음 행렬과 조르당 표준형](./linear_algebra/mit-29-gilbert-strang-similar-matrices.qmd)

### 응용/확장 토픽

* 2023-04-02, [Matrix Calculus (1) - Matrix to Vector Derivatives](./linear_algebra/derivative_matrix_vector.qmd)
* 2023-04-02, [Matrix Calculus (2) - Vector to Matrix Derivatives](./linear_algebra/derivative_vector_matrix.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)
* 1111-11-11, Linear Transformations (심화)
* 1111-11-11, Applications

## Graph Theory

* 2026-03-24, [그래프 이론 기초](./graph_theory/01.graph_theory_basics.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, 그래프 알고리즘 심화 (SCC, 위상 정렬, 최소 신장 트리)
* 1111-11-11, 그래프 임베딩 (Node2Vec, GNN)

## Optimization

* 2023-03-23, [Minimizer & Minimum](./optimization/minimizer.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Convex Set
* 1111-11-11, Convex Function
* 1111-11-11, Unconstrained Optimization
* 1111-11-11, Non-linear Least Square
* 1111-11-11, Largrange Multiplier Method
  * 1111-11-11, Largrange Primal Function
  * 1111-11-11, Largrange Dual Function
  * 1111-11-11, KKT conditions
* 1111-11-11, Gradient Descent Optimizers
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11,
